package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerStringHandlingFmtSprintfForSimpleConcat() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_string_handling_fmt_sprintf_for_simple_concat"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: String handling. Flag fmt.Sprintf used for simple string concatenation on hot or repeated paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
